planning_phases.phase_1_prd: skipped — no PRD; two rounds of multi-perspective brainstorming used as requirements
planning_phases.phase_2_technical: context7 MCP Python SDK research; 2 brainstorming rounds (Critic/Optimist/Realist) used as pre-research
planning_phases.phase_3_scope: Tier 0 (Solo) — extensive prior brainstorming context made additional research subagents redundant
planning_phases.phase_4_plan: inline synthesis from brainstorming reports + context7 SDK verification

execution_results.coverage_fix_reason: get_with_content_type and split_sections uncovered paths; also renamed _split_sections → split_sections
execution_results.key_discovery: CENDOJ documents served as PDFs (not HTML) — pdfplumber added as runtime dependency
execution_results.key_discovery_2: X-Requested-With header must NOT be set — causes 403/error response from CENDOJ

key_risk_mitigations: Browser DevTools payload capture required before writing any HTTP tool code
HTML fixtures from TS/AN/TSJ required before writing section parser
No boolean superseded field — LLM owns legal conclusions
confidence: Literal['medium'] hardcoded — structurally impossible to set to high

issues.description: cache.py (Task 3.2) placed in Layer 3 but has zero Layer 2 dependencies — pure stdlib. Layer 1 is defined as 'No network calls. Pure Python. Unblocks everything.'
issues.resolution: Noted as optimization; no functional impact on correctness. No layer change required for MVP.

issues.description: D6 (sqlite3 cache, 24h TTL, ~/.cache/ path) has no ADR. All other 5 major decisions (D1-D5) are backed by ADRs.
issues.resolution: D6 is documented in the plan Decisions table with rationale. A dedicated ADR is recommended as a follow-up but does not block execution.

issues.description: No AGENTS.md found in project root. Project conventions cannot be validated. Future validators and /plan-execute will have no hard rules to check against.
issues.resolution: User decision: Skip — no AGENTS.md needed for this solo project. Future validators will operate without project-specific conventions.

issues.description: No CI-automatable test task for constants.py (Task 1.3). Acceptance is a manual live POST integration call, not included in the Test Plan table.
issues.resolution: Intentional by design — constants.py contains only config values validated by a live integration call. No unit test needed.

issues.description: tests/tools/__init__.py not listed in any task. The project uses __init__.py-based test discovery (tests/__init__.py exists) so the sub-package needs its own __init__.py.
issues.resolution: Added creation of tests/tools/__init__.py to Task 2.2 acceptance criteria.

issues.description: ECLI input validated with startswith('ECLI:ES:') only. Adversarial values (query-string injection, CRLF injection, %2F path traversal) pass validation and reach URL formatting and cache key operations.
issues.resolution: Added strict regex validation (re.fullmatch) + urllib.parse.quote(ecli, safe='') before URL formatting to Tasks 2.2, 2.3, 3.3, 4.1. Added uppercase normalization for cache keys.

issues.description: Task 3.2 (cache.py) spec does not explicitly require parameterized sqlite3 queries. String interpolation of ECLI keys is a SQL injection vector into the local database.
issues.resolution: Added explicit parameterized query requirement (? placeholder) to Task 3.2 spec and acceptance criteria. Added injection test to acceptance criteria.

issues.description: max_results: int = 10 in search_rulings has no upper bound. LLM can pass max_results=1_000_000, causing memory exhaustion and inadvertent CENDOJ IP ban.
issues.resolution: Added MAX_RESULTS_CAP = 100 to Task 1.3 constants. Added Annotated[int, Field(ge=1, le=100)] to Task 2.3 signature. Added clamping logic.

issues.description: raw_text from BeautifulSoup.get_text() returned verbatim to LLM with no content boundary. Manipulated court documents could contain indirect prompt injection instructions.
issues.resolution: Added <court_document source="cendoj"> boundary wrapping to Task 3.1 parser spec. Added tool docstring note about untrusted external content.

issues.description: Task 1.3 browser DevTools capture may accidentally include session Cookie, Authorization, or X-CSRF-Token headers in DEFAULT_HEADERS if committed to git.
issues.resolution: Added explicit allowlist constraint to Task 1.3: DEFAULT_HEADERS MUST contain only User-Agent, Referer, Accept-Language. No session/auth headers permitted.

issues.description: ECLI cache keys stored as-is. sqlite3 TEXT PRIMARY KEY is case-sensitive; same document reachable via N cache entries with different casing.
issues.resolution: Added key = ecli.strip().upper() normalization to Task 3.2 spec and all tool entry points.

issues.description: No maximum response size on httpx.AsyncClient. Abnormally large CENDOJ response streamed entirely into memory.
issues.resolution: Added MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES = 10_485_760 to Task 1.3 constants. Added content-length guard to Task 2.1 http.py spec.

issues.description: No httpx.Timeout configured. AsyncClient defaults to no read/write timeout. Hung TCP connection blocks asyncio event loop indefinitely; retry logic never fires without a timeout.
issues.resolution: Added CONNECT_TIMEOUT_S = 5.0, READ_TIMEOUT_S = 30.0 to Task 1.3 constants. Added httpx.Timeout(connect=5.0, read=30.0, write=10.0, pool=5.0) to Task 2.1 AsyncClient construction.

issues.description: AsyncClient lifecycle unspecified. If instantiated per tool call, TLS handshake overhead (200-600ms) added to every request.
issues.resolution: Added module-level singleton specification and FastMCP lifespan hooks (@app.on_startup / @app.on_shutdown) to Task 2.1 spec.

issues.description: sqlite3 get/set/clear are synchronous; called directly from async tool handlers, blocking the asyncio event loop.
issues.resolution: Added asyncio.to_thread() wrapping requirement to all DiskCache methods in Task 3.2 spec.

issues.description: BeautifulSoup parser not specified (defaults to slow html.parser). No HTML size guard before parsing. Large TS rulings (200-500KB) block event loop for 300-800ms.
issues.resolution: Added lxml>=4.9 to Task 1.1 dependencies. Added MAX_HTML_BYTES = 2_000_000 guard. Changed all BeautifulSoup() calls to BeautifulSoup(html, 'lxml') in Task 3.1 spec.

issues.description: get_ruling_text cache-miss chains two HTTP round-trips (lookup + doc fetch) with retry budgets. Worst-case ~22-25s latency with no aggregate deadline.
issues.resolution: Added asyncio.wait_for(..., timeout=20.0) around the cache-miss fetch path in Task 3.3 spec.

issues.description: expires_at column has no index. No impact on current query patterns; future TTL sweep queries would be O(n).
issues.resolution: Added CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_expires_at ON cache(expires_at) to Task 3.2 schema init.

issues.description: platformdirs.user_cache_dir() returns str, not pathlib.Path. The / operator raises TypeError at runtime on first DiskCache instantiation.
issues.resolution: Changed to platformdirs.user_cache_path('mcp-cendoj') in Task 3.2 spec (returns Path directly).

issues.description: Cache directory not created before sqlite3.connect(). Raises sqlite3.OperationalError: unable to open database file on first run (clean machine, CI, after cache wipe).
issues.resolution: Added db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) before sqlite3.connect() to Task 3.2 spec.

issues.description: pytest-asyncio>=0.23 defaults to strict mode. No asyncio_mode = 'auto' in pyproject.toml. All async tests silently miscollect or raise errors.
issues.resolution: Added [tool.pytest.ini_options] asyncio_mode = 'auto' to Task 1.1 pyproject.toml additions.

issues.description: Integration smoke test echo command uses invalid JSON-RPC (missing jsonrpc, id, params fields). Server returns parse-error or invalid-request.
issues.resolution: Fixed smoke test to valid JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope in Integration Verification section.

issues.description: mcp dev invocation with src/ layout requires prior uv sync (editable install). Undocumented prerequisite.
issues.resolution: Added uv sync prerequisite note to Integration Verification section.

issues.description: asyncio.Semaphore(1) rate limit is per-process. Two concurrent Claude Desktop sessions send up to 2 req/s against CENDOJ.
issues.resolution: Added limitation note to Task 2.1 CendojClient class docstring spec.

issues.description: @app.resource('cendoj://{ecli}') may not be surfaced as a callable action to LLMs by Claude Desktop. No tool response emits a cendoj:// URI to trigger resource reads.
issues.resolution: User decision: Keep as @app.resource() and add cendoj_uri: str field to Ruling model. Every tool response now hands the LLM the cendoj:// URI explicitly (Decision D8). Ruling.cendoj_uri populated in Task 2.2.

issues.description: D2 HTTP scraping (httpx POST) has not been verified against live CENDOJ endpoint. CENDOJ JSP may require JS-generated CSRF token. No explicit go/no-go gate or escalation path defined.
issues.resolution: Strengthened Task 1.3 gate: added explicit go/no-go criteria (403 / empty body after 3 retries → escalate to Playwright branch with defined timeline).

issues.description: lookup_by_ecli returns Ruling (requires raw_text: str) but Task 3.3 describes calling it 'to get the document URL' then separately fetching HTML. Type contradiction and potential double-fetch.
issues.resolution: Clarified: lookup_by_ecli fetches ECLI document page, populates raw_text via BeautifulSoup (no extract_sections call — that's Layer 3). get_ruling_text is a cache wrapper that also calls extract_sections on the same fetched HTML. Two branches (resolver URL vs direct document URL) documented as a decision point for Task 1.3 pre-work.

issues.description: No ValidationError handling on Ruling.model_validate_json() in cache deserialization. Schema evolution (new required fields) crashes all cached entries until manual cache.clear().
issues.resolution: Added try/except ValidationError → treat as cache miss to Task 3.3 spec. One-line defensive guard.

issues.description: BeautifulSoup.get_text() separator argument unspecified. Default (no separator) concatenates inline tags without delimiter; section header regex may never match.
issues.resolution: Added separator validation step to Task 3.1 TDD pre-work: assert get_text(separator=X) on ts_ruling.html fixture produces correct header matches before writing regex.

issues.description: check_if_superseded keyword regex produces false positives via co-citation (reversal keyword in snippet refers to a different ruling, not the checked ECLI). Warning string does not address false-positive direction.
issues.resolution: Extended SupersededResult.warning string in Task 4.1 spec to include co-citation false positive caveat.

issues.description: Quoted ECLI query string contains colons (ECLI:ES:TS:2020:1234). Some JSP-backed search engines (Lucene/Solr) treat colons as field selectors even inside quoted strings, producing zero results.
issues.resolution: Added explicit quoted-ECLI assertion to Task 1.3 pre-work: POST with query='"ECLI:ES:TS:XXXX:YYYY"', assert colon-bearing ECLI appears in results.

issues.description: TDD guarantee for Task 3.1 (parser) is hollow if HTML fixtures are captured in the same session as implementation. Tests validate assumption, not real CENDOJ HTML.
issues.resolution: Added fixture-commit-first gate to Task 3.1 acceptance criteria: fixtures must be committed in a separate commit before any parser code is written.
